title: List Creatives Request
description: Request parameters for querying creative assets from a creative library with filtering, sorting, and pagination. Implemented by any agent that hosts a creative library — creative agents (ad servers, creative platforms) and sales agents that manage creatives.

adcp_major_version.description: The AdCP major version the buyer's payloads conform to. Sellers validate against their supported major_versions and return VERSION_UNSUPPORTED if unsupported. When omitted, the seller assumes its highest supported version.

include_assignments.description: Include package assignment information in response

include_snapshot.description: Include a lightweight delivery snapshot per creative (lifetime impressions and last-served date). For detailed performance analytics, use get_creative_delivery.

include_items.description: Include items for multi-asset formats like carousels and native ads

include_variables.description: Include dynamic content variable definitions (DCO slots) for each creative

include_pricing.description: Include pricing_options on each creative. Requires account to be provided. When false or omitted, pricing is not computed.

account.description: Account reference for pricing and access. When provided with include_pricing, the agent returns pricing_options from this account's rate card on each creative.

fields.description: Specific fields to include in response (omit for all fields). The 'concept' value returns both concept_id and concept_name.

examples.description: List creatives in a specific concept matching a format
Find DCO creatives for dynamic campaigns
